headline: Latest ‘Star Wars’ Film ‘Mandalorian’ Debuts at $100 Million
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Mandalorian and Grogu, the first film in the Star Wars franchise in seven years, was the highest-grossing movie in the US and Canada over the four-day holiday weekend with $100 million in ticket sales. headline: Comcast Rural Florida Push Tests Broadband Growth Story And Investor Concerns
summary: Comcast expanded high speed internet to thousands of previously unserved rural homes and businesses in Leon County and Lake County, Florida. The buildout is part of a public private partnership focused on closing the digital divide and improving broadband access for underserved communities. The initiative also targets digital skills training and more affordable access options alongside the physical network expansion. For investors watching Comcast (NasdaqGS:CMCSA), this rural expansion...
